rationale: In the citing paper, Jain, Mathur, and Maheswaran (2009) is cited only in grouped background citations to support a general claim that negatively valenced ads can hurt brand attitudes. The paper does not engage this source's lay-theory or approach/avoidance framework in hypothesis development, mechanism testing, or empirical design. Its role is therefore a passing literature-context reference rather than a specific building block for the new model.
